narratives.narrative: Threat actor CDB-FIN-11 has been observed in 4 intelligence signals. Associated vulnerabilities: CVE-2024-54529. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1595, T1566, T1199, T1190, T1078. CRITICAL: 1 zero-day alert(s) correlate with this actor's activity. Average risk score: 10.0/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-MOB-01 has been observed in 2 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1190, T1199, T1566, T1078, T1566.002. Average risk score: 10.0/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-APT-41 has been observed in 2 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1566, T1190, T1078, T1059.001, T1059. Average risk score: 10.0/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-CYB-01 has been observed in 4 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1547, T1190, T1078, T1195, T1059. Average risk score: 9.8/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-APT-28 has been observed in 6 intelligence signals. Associated vulnerabilities: CVE-2025-66376. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1547, T1595, T1566.001, T1195.003, T1566. CRITICAL: 1 zero-day alert(s) correlate with this actor's activity. Average risk score: 9.3/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-APT-22 has been observed in 42 intelligence signals. Associated vulnerabilities: CVE-2026-3888. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1595, T1567, T1566.002, T1071, T1203. CRITICAL: 1 zero-day alert(s) correlate with this actor's activity. Average risk score: 9.0/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.

Threat actor CDB-FIN-09 has been observed in 10 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1547, T1530, T1204.002, T1190, T1199. Average risk score: 8.3/10. Assessment: This actor poses an immediate threat requiring defensive action.
Threat actor CDB-FIN-12 has been observed in 4 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1036, T1595, T1190, T1199, T1566. Average risk score: 8.0/10.
Threat actor CDB-FIN-07 has been observed in 2 intelligence signals. MITRE ATT&CK techniques: T1021.001, T1190, T1199, T1567, T1078. Average risk score: 6.2/10.

Threat actor UNC-UNKNOWN has been observed in 92 intelligence signals. Associated vulnerabilities: CVE-2026-28825, CVE-2026-28833, CVE-2026-33253, CVE-2026-33749, CVE-2025-64648. findings.recommendation: Migrate to ML-KEM (CRYSTALS-Kyber) for key exchange
Replace with ML-KEM or hybrid key exchange

stix_transport.note: TLS 1.3 uses ECDHE — quantum vulnerable for key exchange

jwt_tokens.note: Symmetric crypto — quantum resistant (Grover halves keyspace)

S9_Quantum.recommendation: Begin hybrid key exchange deployment. Inventory all RSA/ECDSA usage for PQC migration.
